title: Ceraglass
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Ceraglass.png|thumb|right|Ceraglass]]
'''Ceraglass''' was a transparent, armor-strong ceramic alloy. It was used in the construction of [[Window/Legends|windows]] for [[Mekuun Corporation/Legends|Mekuun Corporation's]] [[Swift Assault 5]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''
